scripts.package:extension: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path 'public/downloads' | Out-Null; if (Test-Path 'public/downloads/cookie-monster-extension.zip') { Remove-Item -LiteralPath 'public/downloads/cookie-monster-extension.zip' -Force; }; Compress-Archive -Path 'extension/*' -DestinationPath 'public/downloads/cookie-monster-extension.zip' -Force"
